goal: make essentia transport closer to original TC4: alembic/tube/jar suction flow instead of mostly manual transfer
implemented: EssentiaSuction model added with normal/filtered/void jar priorities and alembic/furnace source priorities.
EssentiaTubeBlockEntity rewritten around alembic-aware network movement.
Tube network now prefers AlembicBlockEntity as a source before AlchemicalFurnaceBlockEntity.
Destination selection respects normal jar, filtered jar and void jar suction priorities.
Tube diagnostics now report network size, source count, destination count and last moved aspect.
Transport particles now use native aspect color dust.
AlembicRenderer added to show native-colored essentia fill in the alembic.
Alembic messages now use native TextColor for aspect names.
original_intent: In TC4 essentia transport is suction-driven: sources provide essentia, jars pull it by suction and tubes connect the network.
Alembics are a central source in the distillation chain, so tubes should understand alembics directly.
Filtered and void jars should pull more strongly than normal jars.
remaining: Exact TC4 suction conflict/backflow behavior is not fully replicated yet.
Directional tube connections and tube-side visual caps still need exact models/states.
Tube buffers are not yet simulated as separate in-tube essentia packets.
Arcane alembic/furnace multiblock placement rules need exact TC4 validation.
Need exact tube rendering and valve visual open/closed state.
